chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-4123 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For orders on Misc. No. 18214 of 2024. 2. For orders on office objection No.6. 3. For orders on Misc. No. 18215 of 2024. 4. For orders on Misc. No. 18216 of 2024. 5. For hearing of main case. 29-08-2024 Petitioner – Muhammad Shakeel, in person. ********** 1. Urgency granted. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 2, 4 &5. The Petitioner is a police constable. He submits that he had raised voice/objection against the orders of the police department requiring the police officials to mark their attendance through a mobile application referred to as “POINT ME APP” on the ground that such orders of the department do not consider that some police officials may not be able to afford a smart phone which is required for using that App. He submits that as a consequence of such resistance, he was given a show cause notice dated 08.08.2024, which is therefore malafide. The show cause notice on the record reflects that the charge against the Petitioner is that he had not marked attendance through the mobile App designated for such purpose. The Petitioner states that he has submitted a reply to the show cause notice. In such circumstances, where the department has yet to consider his reply to pass any order against him, the petition is premature. With that observation, the petition is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE *PA/SADAM
